commit.message:
Fix toolbar About button not appearing

AddAction's 4th arg is toolTipText (invisible), 5th is the visible
text label. "About" was only passed as the tooltip so the button
rendered with no icon and no text. Pass it for both args.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ingress management (#202)

* Add ingress management for application environments

Introduces Kubernetes Ingress resource management including:
- Ingress, IngressHost, IngressPath models with versioning
- UI for creating/editing ingresses with hosts, paths, and settings
- Ingress rendering in deploy task with nginx annotations
- use_regex validation for paths (regex vs literal)
- Admin-only extra_annotations support (JSONB)
- Label-based orphan ingress cleanup after deploys
- compact_k8s_name utility for readable, collision-free k8s labels
- Safe UUID lookups with DataError handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Unify ingress UI into single form per card

Consolidate 8 discrete forms per ingress card into one unified form
with a single Save button. Host/path add/remove is now handled
client-side via JS (no page reload). The view processes all changes
(enabled, hosts, paths, settings, annotations) in one transaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: surface real AI errors, retry transient failures, upgrade to Claude Sonnet 4.6

The "I encountered an error analyzing your request" message was hiding
actual Anthropic API errors behind a catch-all that returned fake success
responses. Intermittent failures (529 overloaded, rate limits) were never
retried and their details were completely swallowed.

- Stop error swallowing in getClaudeToolCalls() — re-throw to API route
- Add retry for Anthropic 529/429 errors with existing exponential backoff
- Add typed Anthropic SDK error handling (auth, rate limit, bad request,
  timeout, connection, server errors) with specific user-facing messages
- Upgrade model from legacy claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 to claude-sonnet-4-6
- Upgrade @anthropic-ai/sdk from 0.67.0 to 0.78.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(unified): promote to GA (#1574)

commit.message:
fix(security): R240 adversarial audit — Sprint 4 P3 sweep (24 files, 28 findings)

#[must_use] annotations on security-critical functions:
- verified_core: compute_verdict, compute_single_verdict
- adaptive_rate: AdaptiveRateLimiter::check()
- circuit_breaker: CircuitBreakerManager::can_proceed()
- cascading: CascadingTracker::check_pipeline()
- behavioral: BehavioralTracker::check_session()
- types/core: has_dangerous_chars()

u64-to-usize content_length cast fixes (compare in u64 space):
- proxy/helpers, smart_fallback, fallback, grpc/upstream
- oauth JWKS, federation JWKS

DPoP u64-to-i64 safe casts (reject > i64::MAX):
- oauth: iat, exp, nbf fields via i64::try_from with fail-closed

Server timestamp safe casts:
- dashboard: started_at i64::try_from instead of `as i64`
- iam: M2M now_secs fail-closed on pre-epoch clock
- policy_lifecycle: staged_secs/now_secs via u64::try_from

Lock poisoning logging (was silent unwrap_or(0)):
- context_isolation: entry_count, session_count
- session_isolator: session_count
- sanitizer: mapping_count
- discovery/guard: current() — parity with check()

Silent .ok()/.unwrap_or_default() observability:
- injection scanner: log AhoCorasick compilation failure
- audit/query/file: log entry serialization failure
- audit/otlp: log hex decode failure in trace ID conversion
- config/manifest: log annotation serialization failure
- discovery/serialize: log clock anomaly in snapshot epoch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: use FTPS protocol for Hostinger FTP deploy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Vercel deploy: run build from monorepo root with rootDirectory

The --cwd flag still scoped the nft bundler to the app subdirectory,
preventing it from finding workspace packages in root node_modules/.
Now we pull Vercel config into the app dir, patch rootDirectory to
point at the subdirectory, move .vercel to repo root, and run build/
deploy from root so the bundler can traverse the full monorepo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: comprehensive Twilio migration skill improvements (#29)

* feat: rebuild Twilio migration skill as 6-phase orchestrator

Rewrites the migration skill from a passive 260-line reference document
into a full end-to-end migration orchestrator with discovery, planning,
setup, migration, validation, and cleanup phases.

New infrastructure:
- scan-twilio-usage.sh: grep-based codebase scanner (7 languages)
- scan-twilio-deep.py: AST-level Python scanner + regex for JS/Go/Ruby
- validate-migration.sh: post-migration validation (19 checks)
- extract-sdk-reference.sh: auto-extracts 162 SDK reference files
- Enhanced preflight-check.sh with API balance/numbers/connections checks

New references: sip-trunking, fax, video, iot, lookup migration guides
Enhanced: voice, messaging, webrtc, verify, product-mapping (multi-lang examples)

Test suite: smoke-test.sh, test-webhooks-local.py, webhook-receiver.py,
test-voice.sh, test-messaging.sh, test-verify.sh

Templates: MIGRATION-PLAN.md, MIGRATION-REPORT.md scaffolds

Tested against real Twilio projects (TwilioDevEd/ivr-phone-tree-python,
TwilioDevEd/sms2fa-flask) and validated with live Telnyx API key.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update auto-generated SDK reference files

Refresh SDK reference documentation across all languages (curl, python,
javascript, go, ruby, java) and all product areas with latest API
signatures and examples.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: enhance migration reference guides and add new references

Update voice, messaging, verify, webrtc, sip-trunking, fax, video, iot,
and lookup migration guides with improved examples and clarity. Add new
reference files: account-setup-guide.md, numbers-migration.md,
unsupported-products.md, and webhook-migration.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add discovery/validation wrappers and improve test scripts

Add run-discovery.sh and run-validation.sh phase wrapper scripts.
Update scan-twilio-usage.sh, validate-migration.sh, and integration
test scripts (smoke-test, test-messaging, test-verify, test-voice)
with improved auto-detection and resource creation. Remove unused
extract-sdk-reference.sh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: update SKILL.md orchestrator and migration plan template

Refine 6-phase migration orchestrator with cost approval workflow,
improved phase gating, validation pipeline references, and resume/
recovery instructions. Update migration plan template.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add migration-state.json tracking for cross-phase state

Add scripts/migration-state.sh to track migration progress in a
machine-readable JSON file. Preserves resource IDs (messaging_profile_id,
connection_id, verify_profile_id) across phases and enables resume after
interruption. Update SKILL.md to use state tracking at every phase boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add Twilio to Telnyx error code mapping reference

Map common Twilio error codes to Telnyx equivalents for messaging
(21211, 30003, 30007, 30008), voice (13XXX), verify, and auth errors.
Include both synchronous API and async webhook delivery error codes,
hangup cause mapping, and before/after error handling code examples.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add critical verify_profile_id callout to verify migration guide

Add prominent warning at the top of verify-migration.md that
verify_profile_id is REQUIRED on every Telnyx Verify API call.
Prevents runtime failures from omitting this required parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add explicit validation gating criteria to SKILL.md

Define FAIL vs WARN semantics: FAIL = critical/must-fix (residual
Twilio usage), WARN = informational (strings in comments/docs).
Rule: 0 FAIL = proceed, 1+ FAIL = stop and fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add Ruby/Go webhook examples, make webhook guidance more prominent

Add Sinatra (Ruby) and Go (net/http) webhook receiver examples to
webhook-migration.md. Update SKILL.md Phase 4 to prominently link
webhook migration guide and emphasize webhook handlers as critical
migration work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add error handling guidance to SKILL.md Phase 4

Instruct agents to wrap API calls in try/catch with proper HTTP status
handling (400/401/404/422/429) and link to error-code-mapping.md for
Twilio to Telnyx error code translation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: reduce scanner false positives from comments and lock files

Add lock file exclusions (package-lock.json, yarn.lock, go.sum, etc.)
to both scan-twilio-usage.sh and validate-migration.sh. Add
search_code_only helper to validate-migration.sh that filters out
comment-only lines (# // /* --) to reduce false positive matches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address production-readiness issues found in skill audit

- Fix verify-migration.md: add missing verify_profile_id to Python
  check example and curl check example (would cause 422 errors)
- Fix messaging-migration.md: clarify from_ vs from per language,
  document per-message webhook_url support, add pagination examples
- Fix scan-twilio-usage.sh: add bash 4+ version check with clear
  error message (associative arrays require bash 4+)
- Fix validate-migration.sh: add jq availability check in --json mode
  to prevent silent corruption of validation output
- Fix run-discovery.sh and run-validation.sh: set execute permissions
- Add --include-texml flag documentation to SKILL.md Phase 5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 6 issues from agent testing round 3 — SDK versions, webhook validation, docs

1. CRITICAL: Python/Node/Ruby SDK version pins aligned with current SDKs
   - Python: >=2.0,<3.0 → >=4.0,<5.0 (SDK refs show v4.x patterns)
   - Node: @^2 → @^6 (SDK refs show v6.x patterns)
   - Ruby: ~> 2.0 → ~> 5.0
   - Init patterns added inline so agents see correct syntax immediately

2. HIGH: Webhook validate:false guidance corrected
   - Was: "even with validate:false, you MUST replace with Ed25519"
   - Now: validate:false → remove (no-op), validate:true → replace

3. MEDIUM: README/docs update elevated to mandatory standalone section
   - Was: buried sub-step easily skipped by agents
   - Now: prominent ### section with explicit find/update/commit steps
   - Added Check 15 to lint script catching residual Twilio in READMEs

4. MEDIUM: Connection ID disambiguated into 3 explicit env vars
   - TELNYX_TEXML_APP_ID, TELNYX_CALL_CONTROL_APP_ID, TELNYX_SIP_CONNECTION_ID
   - Each with API endpoint and "NOT a SIP connection ID" warning

5. MEDIUM: Ed25519 WARN now context-aware via scan data
   - Reads has_webhook_validation from twilio-scan.json
   - If original had no validation: FAIL→WARN with "not a regression" message
   - Removes ambiguity for agents making judgment calls on warnings

6. MEDIUM: Dynamic TeXML generation guidance added
   - Explicit VoiceResponse() builder replacement instructions
   - XML escaping rules, references to before/after examples
   - "Do NOT install third-party XML builder libraries"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: lint docs check — use {files:[]} format matching matches_to_json()

The lint_issue() function expects details in {"files": [...]} format,
not a plain JSON array. Plain array caused jq '.files[]' to exit 5
under set -euo pipefail, crashing the script.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update reference docs from v2 to v4 SDK patterns

- messaging-migration.md: Ruby install with version constraint (~> 5.0),
  Celery example uses client.messages.send() not telnyx.Message.create(),
  mock pattern uses v4 client instance
- webrtc-migration.md: Flask credential example uses
  client.telephony_credentials.create() not telnyx.TelephonyCredential
- webhook-migration.md: Django example uses verify_signature() from
  telnyx.webhooks not telnyx.Webhook.construct_event()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: version-pin SDK install suggestions in preflight and smoke scripts

preflight-check.sh and smoke-test.sh warned users to install bare
'pip install telnyx' etc. Updated to match SKILL.md version guidance:
Python >=4.0,<5.0, Node @^6, Ruby ~> 5.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update verify mock pattern from v2 to v4 SDK

verify-migration.md used @patch('telnyx.Verification.submit') which is
the v2 module-level class pattern. Updated to v4 client instance pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update webhook verification to actual v4/v6 SDK API (client.webhooks.unwrap)

Verified against actual installed SDKs (Python telnyx 4.60.0, Node telnyx 6.2.0):
- `from telnyx.webhooks import verify_signature` does NOT exist in v4
- `client.webhooks.signature.verifySignature()` does NOT exist in v6
- `client.telephony_credentials.create_telephony_credential_token` wrong name

Correct patterns (tested):
- Python: client.webhooks.unwrap(payload, headers=request.headers)
- Node: await client.webhooks.unwrap(rawBody, {headers, key})
- Python: client.telephony_credentials.create_token(id)
- Python: client.verifications.actions.verify(id, code=...)

Updated: webhook-migration.md (Flask, Express, Django examples),
voice-migration.md (Python, Node verification), SKILL.md (Express
example), webrtc-migration.md (create_token), verify-migration.md (mock)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add webhooks.unwrap to lint/validate Ed25519 detection patterns

The lint and validate scripts grep for webhook verification evidence.
They matched the old patterns (verify_signature, verifySignature,
construct_event) but not the new correct v4/v6 pattern (webhooks.unwrap).
Without this, migrations using the updated reference docs would fail
the Ed25519 check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat: auto-adjust cash balance on position open/close

- Opening a position deducts cost_basis from account cash (debit) or
  adds it (credit)
- Closing a position returns exit proceeds to cash (debit) or deducts
  closing cost (credit)
- Works for options (×100 multiplier) and equities (×1)
- Wired into create_position, close_position, accept_signal_as_options,
  and bulk_create_positions
- Uses _match_account_balance for multi-account support

useMemo to actually filter contacts by location_id.

AQ-09 Campaign Location Filter: CampaignComposer accepts locations prop, Step 3
shows location dropdown that pre-filters audience contacts; marketing page passes
locations from useLocations.

B11-12 Server-side credits: /api/local-grid/deduct-credits route verifies auth +
business ownership before calling decrement_scan_credits RPC; local-grid page
calls route instead of client-side RPC.

B16-07 ErrorBoundary: add Try Again button (state reset) alongside Reload Page.
B16-08 error.tsx: add src/app/(dashboard)/error.tsx route-level error boundary.

B12-05 Campaign scheduler: pg_cron migration enables pg_cron + pg_net extensions,
schedules send-scheduled Edge Function every 5 minutes via net.http_post.

commit.message:
v49: Filter harmless iOS rejections from crash logs

EmulatorJS generates "Permission was denied" (Wake Lock API) and
"Document is hidden" (background tab) rejections on iOS Safari.
These are harmless browser API limitations, not real crashes.
Filter them out so crash logs only show actual problems.

Room YAML v2 — give Claude full context for focused teaching

New fields per step: look_for, key_takeaway, if_fails, answers
New fields per room: brief (attack path summary), questions (THM/HTB)

Claude now gets the room brief, what to look for in output, the key
lesson for each step, and troubleshooting context when things fail.
This turns generic "here is what I see" analysis into focused
room-specific teaching. Platform questions mapped to answer steps.

Backward compatible — old teach_after/expect_output still loaded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix thread crash bugs and merge improvements from MergeTest

Bug fixes:
- Fix SetClockJitter: add missing m_oSrcHandle parameter to
  SendTextCommandEx — was crashing the test thread on every
  CLOCK_JITTER iteration, causing the ~1 minute early termination
- Fix Run(): remove null m_oIoHandle check that could prevent
  RunMyStuff thread from ever starting (IO control is unused)
- Fix ImageProcessor path: replace broken relative path
  '/../cprogram/...' with correct 'C:\program\ImageProcess\...'

New features from MergeTest:
- Add ALL_DRESS defect (index 8): applies all defects combined
  (jitter + skew + sequential + OE glitch + scrambling + swap x2)
- BLACK moved to index 9, COUNT updated to 10
- Add bTransitionalJitter / iJITTER_TIME_MS: jitter is applied for
  500ms then removed, so DUT can recover each iteration
- Add bTransitionalInterPairDelay / iINTER_PAIR_DELAY_TIME_MS:
  inter-pair delay applied for 500ms then removed
- Update iDefectChangeMask to 0x03FF (all 10 defect types)
- Update iDefectImageMask to 0x03BD (correct for new enum positions)
